title: Sapphire
description: Simply add sapphire to the game.
body: ## What is the mod about? This mod will add a new rare sapphire ore to the game. The sapphire tools and armor have the same stats as diamond ones, sapphire is just a rarer version of diamonds that you would use to perhaps flex on your friends. ## Where do I find sapphire ore? You can find the sapphire ore and deeplsate sapphire ore between **Y=15 and Y=-35 only in cold biomes**. If you don't find the ores at first glance it is normal, it's around 40 times more rare than diamond ores. ## What items the mod add? - Sapphire Block, Sapphire Ore, Deepslare Sapphire Ore - Sapphire Tools *(Same stats as diamond tools)* - Sapphire Armor *(Same stats as diamond armor)*
